data.title: Mindflair Benefits from Infinite Reality’s $3 Billion Equity Raise
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest announcement is out from Pires Investments ( (GB:MFAI) ).

Mindflair plc noted Infinite Reality’s significant equity raise of $3 billion, boosting its valuation to $12.25 billion, along with a strategic partnership with Google Cloud and a collaboration with Warner Bros Discovery Sports. Mindflair, through its investment in Sure Valley Ventures, benefits from Infinite Reality’s success, impacting its own investment portfolio positively and potentially enhancing its future returns.

More about Pires Investments

Mindflair plc is an investment company that provides access to a portfolio of next-generation technology businesses focused on AI. The company targets high-tech sectors such as Artificial Intelligence, Internet of Things, Cyber Security, Machine Learning, Immersive Technologies, and Big Data, which are poised for exponential growth due to global demand.

Spirent Communications ( (GB:SPT) ) has shared an announcement.

Spirent Communications, a UK-based entity, has experienced a notable shift in its shareholding due to a recent transaction involving Qube Research & Technologies Limited. The transaction involved the acquisition or disposal of financial instruments, resulting in Qube holding 4.988140% of voting rights through financial instruments. This change signifies a slight decrease from a previous position of 5.019743%, with implications for stakeholder awareness and potential strategic adjustments within Spirent Communications.

Britvic ( (GB:BVIC) ) has shared an update.

data.title: New Harvest Files Notice of Arbitration Against Dasin Retail Trust Parties
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Dasin Retail Trust ( (SG:CEDU) ) has provided an update.

Dasin Retail Trust’s Trustee-Manager has been notified by New Harvest Investments Limited of a filed Notice of Arbitration and Concurrent Application for Emergency Relief in the Hong Kong International Arbitration Centre. This action follows disputes related to a Sale and Purchase Agreement and a Shareholders’ Agreement from 2021. New Harvest seeks to prevent parties involved from pursuing legal actions outside the arbitration framework and aims for permanent injunctions and declarations to halt actions against the Trustee-Manager.

More about Dasin Retail Trust

Mondi plc ( (GB:MNDI) ) just unveiled an update.

data.title: Completion of Mandatory Cash Offer for Vibropower Corporation
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Vibropower Corporation Limited ( (SG:BJD) ) has provided an update.

Vibropower Corporation Limited, a company based in Singapore, was subject to a mandatory conditional cash offer by Mr. Benedict Chen Onn Meng to acquire all issued and paid-up ordinary shares, excluding those already held by the Offeror. The offer, which included the acquisition of shares through exercised warrants, has officially closed as of January 9, 2025. This marks the completion of the acquisition process, effectively closing the window for any further acceptance of the offer, impacting the company’s shareholding structure significantly.

More about Vibropower Corporation Limited

data.title: Abcourt Mines Embarks on Strategic Drilling Campaign at Flordin Property
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Abcourt Mines ( (TSE:ABI) ) has provided an announcement.

Abcourt Mines Inc. has commenced a drilling campaign on its Flordin Property, aiming to explore potential gold deposits across two sectors. The initiative involves a minimum of 3,000 metres of drilling, targeting both shallow and deep gold mineralization. The campaign seeks to validate previous promising results and explore the continuity of high-grade gold mineralization, which could significantly impact the company’s resource estimates and position within the gold mining industry.

More about Abcourt Mines

Abcourt Mines Inc. is a company operating in the mining industry, primarily engaging in the exploration and development of gold properties. The company is focused on its properties in Canada, with a market emphasis on gold extraction and related mineral resources.

data.title: Northern 2 VCT PLC Launches £36 Million Share Offering for 2024/25
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Northern 2 VCT ( (GB:NTV) ) has shared an update.

Northern 2 VCT PLC, along with Northern Venture Trust PLC and Northern 3 VCT PLC, has released a prospectus for new ordinary shares to raise £36 million in the 2024/25 tax year. These offers will open on January 14, 2025, and are managed by Mercia Fund Management Limited, which will receive a percentage-based fee on the gross proceeds. Existing shareholders will receive a discount on offer costs, and Mercia will cover upfront costs and commissions. This initiative is expected to enhance the investment appeal of Northern 2 VCT PLC and strengthen its market position.

More about Northern 2 VCT

Northern 2 VCT PLC operates in the venture capital trust industry, focusing on providing investment opportunities through the issuance of new ordinary shares. It collaborates with Northern Venture Trust PLC and Northern 3 VCT PLC to offer these investment opportunities, primarily targeting investors looking for tax-efficient investment options in the UK.
